speaker: MATT
raw_text: So as you find your rest for the evening, the morning comes. Bright, warm. The clouds that came in for the evening, it's still a cloudy sky and as you wake up the mist that usually takes up the bottom of the valley and the forest floor is beginning to burn off as the sun begins to peek through the clouds and show little bursts of blue above. You guys head back to the castle, where all of you are, everyone but Keyleth. We'll say Keyleth's still sleeping and Taryon's still sleeping.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Have you scryed on him again?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Not successfully. Not since I briefly found him and then I lost him. But I always have people looking.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All right. I don't know why he's on my mind. Obviously, we have much bigger things.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think maybe bigger things will help. It's been too quiet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Not good at quiet

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No. I mean, I've enjoyed it. This has been great, everything, everything has been great. This is wonderful, but I will admit I miss-- I don't know what I miss. I miss it, though. I feel like I'm tempting fate and I'm going to regret everything I say right now, one day.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think we are, who knows what this will lead to.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we can shut it down for good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we're going to go find a small black tower somewhere filled with death and despair.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know if I'm going to be able to sleep tonight!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So as you find your rest for the evening, the morning comes. Bright, warm. The clouds that came in for the evening, it's still a cloudy sky and as you wake up the mist that usually takes up the bottom of the valley and the forest floor is beginning to burn off as the sun begins to peek through the clouds and show little bursts of blue above. preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN

preceding_turns.text: Not good at quiet

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No. I mean, I've enjoyed it. This has been great, everything, everything has been great. This is wonderful, but I will admit I miss-- I don't know what I miss. I miss it, though. I feel like I'm tempting fate and I'm going to regret everything I say right now, one day.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think we are, who knows what this will lead to.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we can shut it down for good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we're going to go find a small black tower somewhere filled with death and despair.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I don't know if I'm going to be able to sleep tonight!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Not really a bloodhound-style scent, but a decent scent. Guiding him around over the next hour or so, and trying to go in the areas you know he might have been, the last strong scent is in Taryon's room, and there's no trail from there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And you've met us before? No?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No. I've seen you around town. People talk about you, saying what you've done for the people..."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do you bake cream puffs?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I have before, yeah."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you want to work in a bakery? Just kidding. We were in the middle of something; we'll talk to you later! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, does Trinket smell anything having to do with-- can he smell a different smell? Can he smell the evil Hilda?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check with advantage for Trinket.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's good. That's also pretty good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Perception? That is 24!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, Trinket goes, (sniffing, grunting) and picks up what appears to be some sort of a scent.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah! Where did it go?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Taryon, you come to consciousness ever so slightly, and looking down, you see hooves clattering on the ground behind you. You glance around. Percival, I want you to go ahead and make a nature check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And I'm going to try and figure out a discerned direction?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Help with type of plants, whether or not it's getting south, east, west. Not north. Most probably south.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So, before you do that. You take the orb and sit down and concentrate, and Keyleth aids you in setting up this small ritual. As you close your eyes and focus on Taryon once more, your vision shifts and seem to be jettisoned across hundreds of miles within a second. No direction at the moment; it's too much of a blur of color and light and movement until it comes to a halt, and there you see Taryon, somewhat jostled by the spell kicking in and the momentum, you see him thrown over what appears to be the back of a horse, just (hoofbeats).

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Which way is the shadow of the horse?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Oh god, I did it. I'm sorry. It's my fault. Right. So, jumping back into the game. You guys have learned of the current whereabouts of Taryon Darrington. Proceeding in the direction of which he is getting transported. Which, let's go ahead and take a moment here, actually. Taryon, as you've come to consciousness on the back of this horse and you hear this woman, cloaked and riding in front of you, tell you, "We're almost there," and then (hoofbeats). You're hopping around on the back, bound. You try and move your arms and legs, and they're tied tightly.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sam's shirt.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So find your way over to the Twitch chat, put that in there for the chance to win this awesome giveaway! All right, guys. We'll see you in a few minutes! [break]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hey guys, welcome back to Critical Role. We have our winner in the chat. Tonight's winner is FormaldehydeG. You win. Denova will contact you via a whisper to get your contact and shipping information, and you will get your awesome prize of your Wyrmwood box.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (mocking) Prize.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (Christopher Walken voice) Prize.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't do it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. Do you go ahead and accept Keyleth's Wind Walk? All right. With a moment of concentration, you all convert yourselves into plumes of smoke, mist. By the way, did you leave Doty behind or take Doty with you?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You and Tary are thick as thieves, now. How plugged in is his dad?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Super. Right? I mean, he's not the most powerful guy, but he does well for himself. He runs an area.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The way Taryon talks about his father is he is a land baron in Deastok. He owns a number of plots and homes and farms and collects taxes on them. His family has been doing this for at least a generation or two and has made quite a fortune off of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And his sister's name is?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: His sister's name is Maryanne.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maryanne. That's creative. Okay. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, Maryanne Darrington.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And his mom is Mariya. (laughs) All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Mariya and Howaardt?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Mariya and Howaardt Darrington.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: See, I know his mother's name!
